title: pelargonium × leion
intro: Pelargonium × leion, also known as the rose-scented geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × leion include reducing symptoms of menopause, alleviating anxiety and stress, and providing relief from digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
